hint: Just play naturally. Focus on a single strong hand type like Flushes or Two Pair early on to get through the first few Antes.
This unlocks when you beat the Boss Blind in Ante 8. Make sure your Jokers are giving you solid xMult (Multiplicative multiplier) by Ante 5.
Win a run on any difficulty. The Blue Deck (+1 Hand) or Yellow Deck (Start with extra money) are fantastic for beginners.
Red Stake removes the reward money for having leftover Discards. You will need to rely more on Interest and Economy Jokers to make money.
Black Stake gives some Jokers an 'Eternal' sticker (they cannot be sold or destroyed). Be very careful what you buy, as it will take up a Joker slot forever!
Gold stake is brutal. The 'Plasma Deck' or 'Yellow Deck' are highly recommended. Focus on surviving the early antes while building a massive economy.
This will unlock naturally as you play the game. Just keep playing hands!
This will unlock naturally. Don't be afraid to use your discards to find the cards you actually need.

Use the 'Anaglyph Deck'. Every time you defeat a Boss, you get a Double Tag. Save these up until you see an 'Economy Tag' (Doubles your money up to $40). Skip the blind, and all your Double Tags will trigger, multiplying your money massively!
Use the 'Lover' Tarot card to turn standard cards into Wild cards. The 'DNA' Joker helps duplicate them, or use the 'Familiar' Spectral card.

Win in 12 or fewer rounds. There are 8 Bosses in a run. This means you only have 4 'spare' rounds you can play. You MUST skip almost every single Small and Big blind. The 'Throwback' Joker is incredible here, as it gives you xMult for every blind you skip.
You must buy 5 Vouchers before beating Ante 4. Make sure you keep $10 in your bank going into every shop, and prioritize buying Vouchers over Jokers early on.

Use the 'Justice' tarot card to turn your cards into Glass. Glass cards have a 1 in 4 chance of breaking when scored. Play a 5-card hand made entirely of Glass cards to maximize your odds of 2 breaking at once.
Don't try to force this naturally. Play the 'Checkered Deck' (contains only Spades and Hearts) to make drawing a Royal Flush significantly easier.
Level up a single hand type to Level 10. Buy every Planet card for your favorite hand, and use the 'Telescope' Voucher to guarantee that planet appears in Celestial Packs.
10,000 points in a single hand. Unlocks naturally as you learn to build your Jokers with a mix of +Chips, +Mult, and xMult.
1,000,000 points. You will need strong xMult Jokers like 'Vampire', 'Campfire', or 'Hologram' leveled up.

100,000,000 points. The 'Plasma Deck' is fantastic for this, as it balances your Chips and Mult. Focus entirely on massive Chip generation or massive Mult generation, and the deck will do the math for you.
Thin your deck to 20 or fewer cards. Use the 'Trading Card' Joker (destroys the first discarded card), 'Hanged Man' Tarots, and 'Immolate' Spectral cards.
Grow your deck to 80 or more cards. The 'Marble Joker' (adds 1 Stone card every blind) and 'Certificate' Joker (adds a card every round) make this very easy.
Discover every Tarot card. Just keep opening Arcana packs whenever you can.
Discover every Planet card. Note: Planet X (Five of a Kind), Ceres (Flush House), and Eris (Flush Five) only appear in packs AFTER you play those hidden hands at least once.
Discover every Spectral card. Open Spectral packs when they appear in the shop.
Discover every Voucher. Some Vouchers have specific unlock requirements (like playing a certain amount of cards) before they can even appear in the shop.
Discover 100% of your collection (Decks, Jokers, Tarots, Planets, Spectrals, Vouchers). Check your 'Collection' tab on the main menu to see what you are missing.
Win a run on Gold Stake difficulty with every single Deck. This is an incredibly long grind.
Get a Gold Sticker on every Joker. This means you must have every Joker in your active inventory at the exact moment you beat Ante 8 on Gold Stake. The ultimate Balatro grind.
Complete any challenge run. Challenges are unlocked after winning your first standard run.
Complete all 20 challenge runs. Some of these completely change the rules of the game!
Discover a Legendary Joker. These can only be obtained by finding 'The Soul' card, which has a very rare chance of replacing a regular card in Tarot or Spectral packs.
